$comment: GOLDEN PATH — the canonical Loyalty lifecycle. Source of truth for the loyalty surface: the SDK loyalty module (earn/redeem/getMember), the reference app's loyalty screen, and the live sandbox matrix (test/golden.integration.mjs) all replay THESE steps. A drift gate (examples/golden-path/loyalty.test.mjs) fails if the arithmetic or the guard diverges. Points are whole integers; balances are SHOP-scoped and never negative; redeem cannot exceed the balance. Values are illustrative.

steps.note: earn auto-provisions the member account (no separate create)
rejected: no points deducted, no ledger entry written; balance unchanged
